title: 4Pcs Wooden Washing Up Brush, Dish Brushes for Washing Up, Bamboo Natural Scrub Brush, Eco Replacement Brushes, Interchangeable Soft Bristle Refills（Handle Not Included）
features: Sustainable Kitchen Brush：Our washing up brushes is made from natural materials, and can reduce carbon footprint and waste, create a greener kitchen, provide replaceable brush heads for your daily life, and ensure sustainable cleaning

Economical Dish Cleaning Brush:Our eco washing up brush comes with 4 brush heads, perfect for cleaning cups and washing dishes, other products wear out and you usually have to throw them away. In contrast, the practical design of our eco-cleaning products allows you to simply replace the wood brush head without buying a new set. Reduce waste and costs and protect the environment

Easy to Maintain:Our kitchen brushes for dishes comes with gentle bristles that are good at removing dirt from cutlery and cookware. Maintaining this brush head is a breeze, you just need to wash it by hand with soap and water before drying. It is very easy to operate and can meet your daily needs

Wide Application:This dish brush has many uses, it can not only be used for tableware. It can also be used in our kitchen, shower tiles or carpets to clean dirt from any surface. This product is a thoughtful eco-friendly gift for loved ones who want to switch to a more sustainable and hygienic lifestyle.
Note:You will receive 4 pcs wooden dish brush,If you are not satisfied with any eco friendly products or any item please contact us.
